prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: portrait upgrade card background for a mobile game supply selection popup
Primary request: Create a vertical post-apocalyptic sci-fi UI card frame with a noticeably narrower border than a typical heavy armored card, specifically designed for nine-slice use on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background.
Scene/backdrop: the entire background outside the card must be one uniform #00ff00 with no gradients, shadows, glow spill, texture, floor, or lighting variation
Subject: one centered upright card frame, front-facing, no perspective
Style: premium wasteland-tech metal, bronze steel, subtle amber light seams, crisp game-ready render, slightly worn but refined
Composition: tall portrait card with compact four-corner armor accents, slim left and right side rails, slim top and bottom caps, and a large calm dark center area intended for icon, title, tag, and description
Technical requirements: ideal for a final in-game card around 176x360; the visible frame thickness should feel about 20 percent to 30 percent slimmer than the previous heavy version; all corner ornaments must stay compact and not protrude deeply into the content area; left and right borders should be visually narrow and stretch-safe; top and bottom borders should be visually narrow and stretch-safe; center area should be dark, low-detail, high-legibility, and much larger than before; do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the card; no text, no icons, no particles, no floating wings, no decorative bulk that eats into the center
Output goal: source artwork suitable for Sprite SLICED border setup without corner distortion after chroma-key background removal, optimized for maximizing usable content space
